I also expect in the future, some of them will choose to devote themselves to polar research and maybe even work with us.'" So from this, we know that Wu Jinyou is the head of the Polar Research Institute of China and the leader of the group. His statement expresses that he values the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. He also hopes that some students might pursue polar research in the future.
